title: Podology Mission and Vision
content:
Podology Mission and Vision

Mission

Podology program within Üsküdar University Health Services Vocational School, is to educate students who have gained the necessary knowledge and skills to protect foot health and prevent diseases that may occur, can follow and apply current techniques, have developed communication and problem solving skills by giving importance to human health and ethical values, and have ethical and moral values.

Vision

Podology program within Üsküdar University Health Services Vocational School is to ensure that respected, qualified individuals who have reached international level knowledge and are preferred for employment in the public and private sectors are brought into business life.
